nasb.text: for this son of mine was dead and has come to life again; he was lost and has been found.’ And they began to celebrate.

esv.text: For this my son was dead, and is alive again; he was lost, and is found.’ And they began to celebrate.

cnv.text: 因為我這兒子是死而復活、失而又得的。’他們就歡樂起來。

ccb.text: 因我这儿子是死而复活、失而复得的。’于是他们欢宴庆祝。

csbs.text: 因为我这个儿子是死而复生、失而复得的。’于是他们开始庆祝。
